if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND o.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND o.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdProdOpt :: selectById */ o.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_ot.code_label AS opt_type_cd_nm , cd_oit.code_label AS opt_input_type_cd_nm FROM pd_prod_opt o LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = o.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ot ON cd_ot.code_grp = 'OPT_TYPE' AND cd_ot.code_value = o.opt_type_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_oit ON cd_oit.code_grp = 'OPT_INPUT_TYPE' AND cd_oit.code_value = o.opt_input_type_cd WHERE o.opt_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdProdOpt :: selectList */ o.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_ot.code_label AS opt_type_cd_nm , cd_oit.code_label AS opt_input_type_cd_nm FROM pd_prod_opt o LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = o.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ot ON cd_ot.code_grp = 'OPT_TYPE' AND cd_ot.code_value = o.opt_type_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_oit ON cd_oit.code_grp = 'OPT_INPUT_TYPE' AND cd_oit.code_value = o.opt_input_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdProdOpt :: selectPageList */ o.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_ot.code_label AS opt_type_cd_nm , cd_oit.code_label AS opt_input_type_cd_nm FROM pd_prod_opt o LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = o.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ot ON cd_ot.code_grp = 'OPT_TYPE' AND cd_ot.code_value = o.opt_type_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_oit ON cd_oit.code_grp = 'OPT_INPUT_TYPE' AND cd_oit.code_value = o.opt_input_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(o.*) /* base.ec.pd :: PdProdOpt :: selectPageCount */ FROM pd_prod_opt o
